calendar.matters:
HEARING ON PETITIONER DANIELLE ROBERSON'S REQUEST TO DISPENSE WITH FURTHER NOTICE TO THE OTHER PARENT OF THE PROPOSED NAME CHANGE OF THE MINOR, JOSIAH MESSIJAH ROBERSON
Off Calendar May-08-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being continued from Apr-03-2023 for Petitioner to give notice to Father, Mansour Saki Njie.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 09:05:26 a.m. and concluding at 09:12:04 a.m.

Petitioner Danielle Earlene P Roberson appearing in pro per, is placed under oath, and testifies.
Minor Josiah Messijah Roberson is present.

The Court determines Petitioner has notified minor's Father of the petition to change name and of today's hearing via Instagram. Petitioner notifies the Court that Father is on his way to Antlanta, Georgia. Court examines Petitioner regarding further communications made with Father.

Court confirms that Father, Mansour Saki Njie gives his permission for name change by Screenshots from Instagram, Direct Message.

Based on the statements made by Petitioner and the review of Screenshots giving consent of Father, Petitioner Danielle Robersons's Request to Dispense with Further Notice to the Other Parent of the Proposed Name Change of the Minor, Josiah Messijah Roberson is GRANTED.

Proposed order signed, filed, and served in open court.

HEARING ON PETITIONER DANIELLE ROBERSON'S REQUEST TO DISPENSE WITH FURTHER NOTICE TO THE OTHER PARENT OF THE PROPOSED NAME CHANGE OF THE MINOR, JOSIAH MESSIJAH ROBERSON
Off Calendar Apr-03-2023 Continued To May-08-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for hearing on Petitioner Danielle Roberson's request to Dispense with further notice to the other parent of th eproposed name change of the minor, Josiah Messijah Roberson.

Dept. 505; Judge: Michelle Tong; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 09:15:50 a.m. and concluding at 09:40:44 a.m.

Petitioner Danielle Earlene P. Roberson appearing in pro per, is placed under oath, and testifies.

Petitioner updates the Court on her efforts to locate the father of the minor, Mansour Saki Njie as set forth on the record.

Court reviews related family law matter.
Court determines the Father's last known address is 2562 Foothill Blvd., Richmond, CA 94804.

Publication of name change is currently pending and shall be completed by Apr-13-2023.
Court orders matter continued to May-08-2023 AT 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 505 to allow Petitioner to make further efforts to locate minor's Father.

COURT ORDERS THE FOLLOWING:

1. Petitioner shall message Mansour Saki Njie on Instagram and any other social media accounts to notify him that she wants to change their son's name.

2. Petitioner shall direct her Sister to retrieve Mansour Saki Njie's telephone number. She must write a statement confirming that she notified him that the Petitioner wishes to change their son's name.

3. Petitioner shall go to Mansour Saki Njie's last known address and show proof of her visit.
